Write a review
How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

  • Kenfre
    5.0 out of 5 stars Good purchase
    Reviewed in the United States on September 2, 2025
    Size: Samsung Note 10 PlusColor: Black
    Reliable and sturdy case. Simple and sleek design. I've dropped the phone several times since applying the new case and so far, so good. No issues. Worth the price.
    Helpful
    Sending feedback...
    Thank you for your feedback.
    Sorry, we failed to record your vote. Please try again
         Report
  • Autumn
    5.0 out of 5 stars Great if you want a basic, sleek case
    Reviewed in the United States on August 22, 2025
    Size: Samsung S21 UltraColor: BlackVerified Purchase
    I've used this case for a long time. I had a version of it 4 years ago and just now had to replace it. I still have my older Samsung model phone and this has kept it protected for years. It's simple, sleek and the brushed texture on the back really sets it apart for me. It doesn't show fingerprints very easy and really only wore down where I hold my phone the most. I don't own a computer, tablet, any of that, so my phone is it. If you're looking for a basic case that looks sleek and protects your phone? Buy it.
    Autumn
    5.0 out of 5 stars
    Great if you want a basic, sleek case

    Reviewed in the United States on August 22, 2025
    I've used this case for a long time. I had a version of it 4 years ago and just now had to replace it. I still have my older Samsung model phone and this has kept it protected for years. It's simple, sleek and the brushed texture on the back really sets it apart for me. It doesn't show fingerprints very easy and really only wore down where I hold my phone the most. I don't own a computer, tablet, any of that, so my phone is it. If you're looking for a basic case that looks sleek and protects your phone? Buy it.
